title: Suspicion Falls on the Straw Hats
description: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
scene: Across pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part follows Luffy, Nico Robin, Paulie, Nami, Zoro. Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.

dialogue.speaker: Paulie
dialogue.text: Run away! It's coming this way!!!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Yeah, just go and be crushed.

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: What was that weird cannon thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Even though we did get away...

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: Let's just get to ice- Ossan!!!

dialogue.speaker: Iceburg
dialogue.text: What!? How can we in this uproar?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I'll make him disappear after I relief.

summary: Robin’s secret movements and the World Government’s presence begin to pull Water Seven away from a simple ship-repair story.
